$comment: THE escalation token contract — single source of truth for both platforms. Mac consumes it as the CSS custom-property blocks in dist/index.html (#drawer/#morning + .lvl1/.lvl2); iOS mirrors it in Theme/EscalationTheme.swift. Each platform has a test pinning its values to this file (Mac: __buddy.smokeTest lvl1/lvl2 colour asserts; iOS: EscalationTokenParityTests). Change the design here FIRST, then both platforms, or the tests fail.
rule: Level is driven by the ACTIVE task count: <=4 lvl0, ==5 lvl1, >=6 lvl2. THE PATTERN (2026-07-10): EVERY text and element follows lvl0 black-on-white, lvl1 red-text-on-white, lvl2 white-on-red. No carve-outs: done rows, day headers, glyphs, settings text and controls all follow.
